2606.23002.title: Machine Translation and Post-Editing: Comparative Evaluation of Different MT Systems and Post-Editor Groups in Specialised Translation
2606.23002.paper_summary: This article aims to evaluate the quality of machine translation (MT) and post-editing (PE) in the context of specialised translation from English into French. Three MT systems (DeepL, eTranslation and Systran) were compared, and two groups of post-editors -linguists/translators and NLP experts -were asked to perform post-editing. Translation assessment is based on error annotation using an error typology adapted to MT and PE evaluation. The results reveal significant differences between the three MT systems and the two groups of post-editors, particularly in terms of terminological accuracy and fluency. This study highlights the importance of domain knowledge in specialised translation, as well as the limitations and variable performance of MT systems in language for specific purposes (LSP).
2606.23002.paper_summary_zh: 這篇文章旨在評估機器翻譯 (MT) 和後編輯 (PE) 在從英語到法語的專業翻譯中的質量。<lb/>三個機器翻譯系統（DeepL、eTranslation 和 Systran）被進行比較，並要求兩組後編輯——語言學家/翻譯者和自然語言處理專家——進行後編輯。<lb/>翻譯評估基於使用適應於 MT 和 PE 評估的錯誤類型進行的錯誤註釋。<lb/>結果顯示三個機器翻譯系統和兩組後編輯之間存在顯著差異，特別是在術語準確性和流暢性方面。<lb/>這項研究突顯了專業翻譯中領域知識的重要性，以及機器翻譯系統在特定用途語言 (LSP) 中的局限性和變化性能。
2606.23002.author: Joachim Minder et.al.
2606.23002.authors: Joachim Minder, Alexandra Mestivier, Natalie Kübler
